items.line_en: Hello everyone, I'm Dr. Jones.

coach.say: Hello everyone, I'm Dr. Jones.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello everyone, / I'm Dr. / Jones.

items.line_en: My job is to help people stay healthy.

coach.say: My job is to help people stay healthy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My job is to help people stay healthy.

items.line_en: Let's find out what happens when you go to the doctor.

coach.say: Let's find out what happens when you go to the doctor.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let's find out what happens when / you go to the doctor.

items.line_en: First, the doctor will talk to you and your parents to find out how you feel.

coach.say: First, the doctor will talk to you and your parents to find out how you feel.
coach.hint: Chunk it: First, / the doctor will talk to you and your parents to find out how you feel.

items.line_en: Then, the doctor will give you a checkup.

coach.say: Then, the doctor will give you a checkup.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Then, / the doctor will give you a checkup.

items.line_en: A checkup is when the doctor makes sure that your body is healthy.

coach.say: A checkup is when the doctor makes sure that your body is healthy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A checkup is when / the doctor makes sure that your body is healthy.

items.line_en: You can get checkups even if you are not sick.

coach.say: You can get checkups even if you are not sick.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You can get checkups even if / you are not sick.

items.line_en: The doctor will check to make sure that you are growing well and taking care of your body.

coach.say: The doctor will check to make sure that you are growing well and taking care of your body.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The doctor will check to make sure that you are growing well and / taking care of your body.

items.line_en: They may use special tools like a stethoscope.

coach.say: They may use special tools like a stethoscope.
coach.hint: Chunk it: They may use special tools like a stethoscope.

items.line_en: A stethoscope is used to check your heart and lungs.

coach.say: A stethoscope is used to check your heart and lungs.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A stethoscope is used to check your heart and / lungs.

items.line_en: The doctor might also check your mouth, ears, nose and other parts of your body.

coach.say: The doctor might also check your mouth, ears, nose and other parts of your body.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The doctor might also check your mouth, / ears, / nose and other parts of your body.

items.line_en: If you are sick or hurt, the doctor may give you something to help you feel better.

coach.say: If you are sick or hurt, the doctor may give you something to help you feel better.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If you are sick or hurt, / the doctor may give you something to help you feel better.

items.line_en: This could be medicine or a bandage.

coach.say: This could be medicine or a bandage.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This could be medicine or / a bandage.

items.line_en: When your visit is done, the doctor might give you a special prize.

coach.say: When your visit is done, the doctor might give you a special prize.
coach.hint: Chunk it: When your visit is done, / the doctor might give you a special prize.

items.line_en: A nurse is someone who helps the doctor.

coach.say: A nurse is someone who helps the doctor.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A nurse is someone who helps the doctor.

items.line_en: This is my friend, Nurse Nancy.

coach.say: This is my friend, Nurse Nancy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This is my friend, / Nurse Nancy.

items.line_en: Hello, boys and girls.

coach.say: Hello, boys and girls.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello, / boys and girls.

items.line_en: Would you like to know what nurses do?

coach.say: Would you like to know what nurses do?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Would you like to know what nurses do?

items.line_en: The nurse will ask you questions and write your answers down for the doctor.

coach.say: The nurse will ask you questions and write your answers down for the doctor.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The nurse will ask you questions and / write your answers down for the doctor.

items.line_en: Nurses may even help the doctor check you.

coach.say: Nurses may even help the doctor check you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Nurses may even help the doctor check you.

items.line_en: Like doctors, we also want to keep you well and healthy.

coach.say: Like doctors, we also want to keep you well and healthy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Like doctors, / we also want to keep you well and healthy.

items.line_en: There are many different types of doctors.

coach.say: There are many different types of doctors.
coach.hint: Chunk it: There are many different types of doctors.

items.line_en: This is an optometrist or an eye doctor.

coach.say: This is an optometrist or an eye doctor.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This is an optometrist or / an eye doctor.

items.line_en: The eye doctor checks your eyes to make sure that you can see well.

coach.say: The eye doctor checks your eyes to make sure that you can see well.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The eye doctor checks your eyes to make sure that you can see well.

items.line_en: Sometimes the eye doctor may tell you that you need glasses.

coach.say: Sometimes the eye doctor may tell you that you need glasses.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sometimes the eye doctor may tell you that you need glasses.

items.line_en: It seems he has just told it to Billy.

coach.say: It seems he has just told it to Billy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It seems he has just told it to Billy.

items.line_en: Hello, Billy. How is your visit at the optometrist's office?

coach.say: Hello, Billy. How is your visit at the optometrist's office?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello, / Billy. / How is your visit at the optometrist's office?

items.line_en: It was amazing.

coach.say: It was amazing.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It was amazing.

items.line_en: The doctor used a cool machine to check my eyes.

coach.say: The doctor used a cool machine to check my eyes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The doctor used a cool machine to check my eyes.

items.line_en: It looked like a robot.

coach.say: It looked like a robot.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It looked like a robot.

items.line_en: And they got new green glasses.

coach.say: And they got new green glasses.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And they got new green glasses.

items.line_en: I can see much better now.

coach.say: I can see much better now.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I can see much better now.

items.line_en: Well, that sure sounds fun.

coach.say: Well, that sure sounds fun.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Well, / that sure sounds fun.

items.line_en: Uh oh.

coach.say: Uh oh.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Uh oh.

items.line_en: It looks like Buddy's not feeling too well.

coach.say: It looks like Buddy's not feeling too well.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It looks like Buddy's not feeling too well.

items.line_en: Maybe he needs new glasses.

coach.say: Maybe he needs new glasses.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Maybe he needs new glasses.

items.line_en: No. You'll have to take him to a veterinarian.

coach.say: No. You'll have to take him to a veterinarian.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No. / You'll have to take him to a veterinarian.

items.line_en: A veterinarian is a doctor that helps sick animals.

coach.say: A veterinarian is a doctor that helps sick animals.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A veterinarian is a doctor that helps sick animals.

items.line_en: If your pet is not feeling well, you can take it to the vet.

coach.say: If your pet is not feeling well, you can take it to the vet.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If your pet is not feeling well, / you can take it to the vet.

items.line_en: I see. A vet helps sick animals.

coach.say: I see. A vet helps sick animals.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I see. / A vet helps sick animals.

items.line_en: Have you ever been to the doctor's office?

coach.say: Have you ever been to the doctor's office?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you ever been to the doctor's office?

items.line_en: What type of doctor did you visit?

coach.say: What type of doctor did you visit?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What type of doctor did you visit?

items.line_en: Tell us about it in the comments.

coach.say: Tell us about it in the comments.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tell us about it in the comments.

items.line_en: Thanks for watching. Goodbye.

coach.say: Thanks for watching. Goodbye.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thanks for watching. / Goodbye.

items.line_en: See you.

coach.say: See you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: See you.

items.line_en: Goodbye.

coach.say: Goodbye.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Goodbye.

items.line_en: Subscribe to our channel to stay updated on new videos.

coach.say: Subscribe to our channel to stay updated on new videos.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Subscribe to our channel to stay updated on new videos.
